code: import React,{useState,useEffect}from'react';import{Link}from'react-router-dom';import'./Cart.css';import{formatPrice}from'../utils/FormatPrice';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs,Fragment as _Fragment}from"react/jsx-runtime";function Cart(){const[cart,setCart]=useState([]);useEffect(()=>{const savedCart=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('cart'))||[];setCart(savedCart);},[]);const removeItem=index=>{const updatedCart=[...cart];updatedCart.splice(index,1);localStorage.setItem('cart',JSON.stringify(updatedCart));setCart(updatedCart);};const total=cart.reduce((sum,item)=>sum+item.price*item.quantity,0);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"cart-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Your Cart"}),cart.length===0?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Your cart is empty."}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(_Fragment,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("ul",{children:cart.map((item,index)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("li",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:"/images/".concat(item.image),alt:"Product: ".concat(item.name)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{children:[item.name," (",formatPrice(item.price),") x ",item.quantity]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>removeItem(index),children:"Remove"})]},index))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("h3",{children:["Total: ",formatPrice(total)]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{to:"/checkout",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{children:"Proceed to Checkout"})})]})]});}export default Cart;
